title: Senior Plant Manager at Parle Products

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Parle Products
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!
